events.preview: [{"id":"9fxf-t2tr","title":"Dallas Police Active Calls","agency":"Dallas Police Department","city":"Dallas","portal":"www.dallasopendata.com","blurb":"Live feed of active Dallas Police calls — incident type, division, priority, location, an

answer: We have four datasets related to Dallas. These include the "Dallas Police Active Calls" dataset with live updates on police incidents, the "Dallas 311 Service Requests" dataset covering non-emergency service requests, and a dataset from the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality for the Dallas/Fort Worth region. Additionally, there is a "Peer Cities Table" comparing Dallas to other cities in a parks and facilities study.
